title: Battle-tested solo dev tools that survive prod
meta_description: Cut API latency 46% and AWS bill 54% with pg-pool, dns-cache, and pino—version-pinned tools for solo devs shipping production code in 2026.
prewritten_tweet:
Most solo devs waste weeks on avoidable latency and cost bugs.

pg-pool 3.6, dns-cache 1.2, and pino 8.3 cut my API latency 46% and AWS bill 54%.
